cover.subtitle:
고구려를 잇는 나라,
해동의 융성한 국가.
cover.imagePrompt: Balhae kingdom illustration, 8th century. ONE Balhae king figure (King Mun) in deep indigo robe with Goguryeo-style fur-trimmed collar, standing on a stone-paved Sanggyeong palace boulevard at dawn. Behind him a tall stone lantern (seokdeung) and a tiled Goguryeo-style roof. Composition: imperial dignity, cool morning light. Color: deep indigo + bronze + clay-brown + amber. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 발해 왕의 연호(인안=무왕, 대흥=문왕, 건흥=선왕)와 업적을 섞어서 묻는다. '고구려 계승 근거 5종(일본 국서·지배층·온돌·이불병좌·석등)'은 거의 매회 출제되는 핵심 포인트다.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized stone lantern (seokdeung) icon shown from a slight angle. RIGHT: a small twin-Buddha (ibulbyeongjwa) silhouette. Cream #F2EDE3 base + deep indigo #3D4A6B accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
